chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 3902 of 2021 CP D 3222 of 2022 CP D 2688 of 2023 CP D 630 of 2024 ____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ____________________________________________________________ 1. For hearing of Misc. No.16159/2021 2. For hearing of main case 11.02.2025 Mr. Hyder Ali Khan advocate for the petitioner Messrs. Ali Almani and Furqan Mushtaq, advocates for the petitioner Mr. Mukesh Kumar Khatri, advocate for respondent Syed Irshad-ur-Rehman advocate for respondent Mr. Kaleemullah advocate holds brief for Mr. Ghulam Murtaza, advocate for respondent Ms. Alizeh Bashir, Assistant Attorney General It is jointly stated that these petitions are covered by the Division Bench order of this court in the case of Abbott Laboratories (Paksitan) ltd. vs. Pakistan and others (CP D 4045 of 2019) and Supreme Court judgment reported as 2022 SCMR 1135, in view thereof may be disposed of in the said terms. Order accordingly. Office is instructed to place copy of this order in connected matters. Judge Judge Amjad
